module.name: no-for-in
module.description: Disallow for..in loops; use Object.keys/values/entries to avoid prototype-chain iteration.

scenarios.name: should allow for..of loops
scenarios.given: a for..of loop iterating over an array

scenarios.name: should allow a standard for loop with index
scenarios.given: a for(let i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) loop

scenarios.name: should report a for..in loop over an object
scenarios.given: a for(const key in obj) loop
scenarios.then: a noForIn violation is reported on the ForInStatement
